subcodes.first_line: O ye two cherished handmaidens of God, Jináb-i-Áqá Mírzá Habíbu'lláh hath made mention of your names in his letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز عزیز الهی جناب آقا میرزا حبیب الله در نامه خویش نام شما برده و
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @praise and encouragement
